card.name: Deranged Dismissal
card.text: Flash When Deranged Dismissal enters the battlefield, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until Deranged Dismissal leaves the battlefield. Madness {1}{W} (If you discard this card, discard it into exile. When you do, cast it for its madness cost or put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Third Eye Rune
card.text: Enchant creature When Third Eye Rune enters the battlefield or enchanted creature dies, draw a card. Enchanted creature has vigilance.

card.name: Undisciplined Militia
card.text: Whenever a creature you control dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Undisciplined Militia.

card.name: Bastion Crab
card.text: {U}: Bastion Crab gets +1/-1 until end of turn.

card.name: Extemporaneous Interference
card.text: Improvise (Your artifacts can help cast this spell. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for {1}.) Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2} plus an additional {1} for each artifact that improvised Extemporaneous Interference.

card.name: Ice Knot
card.text: Enchant artifact or creature When Ice Knot enters the battlefield, tap enchanted permanent. Enchanted permanent doesn't untap during its controller's untap step.

card.name: Dark Augur
card.text: When Dark Augur dies, return a card at random from your graveyard to your hand. (Dark Augur will be a part of your graveyard for this ability.)

card.name: Opportunistic Hit
card.text: Destroy target tapped creature. Draw a card.

card.name: Sharpfang Bat
card.text: Flying, first strike

card.name: Conflagration Wyrm
card.text: Flying, trample, haste When Conflagration Wyrm enters the battlefield, it deals damage equal to the number of Mountains you control to any nonplayer target.

card.name: Fire Blast
card.text: Fire Blast deals 6 damage to target creature.

card.name: Slagvore
card.text: Menace {R}: Slagvore gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Arborstride Sharpshooter
card.text: Reach When Arborstride Sharpshooter enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on it for each creature with flying you don't control.

card.name: Feast on the Feeble
card.text: Panic {3}{G}{G} (You may cast this spell as though it had flash for its panic cost.) Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to target creature you don't control. If Feast on the Feeble was panicked, conjure two copies of Prey Upon into your hand. (They're sorceries with mana cost {G} and "Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.")

card.name: Shadestalker
card.text: Reach Whenever Shadestalker blocks or becomes blocked by a creature with flying, regenerate it. (The next time this creature would be destroyed this turn, it isn't. Instead tap it, remove all damage from it, and remove it from combat.)

card.name: Self-Sufficiency 101
card.text: Teach target creature your choice of up to two of the following abilities. (To teach a creature an ability, put that ability counter on it. If it already has that ability, you may put a +1/+1 counter on it instead.) • Flying • Lifelink • Vigilance • Hexproof

card.name: Sezilak the Merciless
card.text: Flying, deathtouch Whenever Sezilak the Merciless or another nontoken creature you control dies, create a number of 1/1 black and green Insect creature tokens equal to Sezilak's power.

card.name: Strength of the Pack
card.text: Other creatures you control that share a color with Strength of the Pack get +X/+X, where X is its power. Whenever you cast a creature spell, Strength of the Pack becomes a creature until this ability resolves, then if that spell's power is grater than Strength of the Pack's power, put a +1/+1 counter on Strength of the Pack.

card.name: Fluvial Astrolabe
card.text: {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Fluvial Astrolabe: Tutor for up to two basic lands, then scry 2. (Search your library for that many cards and if a quality is specified, reveal those cards. Put all cards found this way into your hand, then shuffle. Then scry 2.)

card.name: Consellis Canidae
card.text: Constellation — Whenever Consellis Canidae or another enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, gain 1 life.

card.name: Angelic Inspiration
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+1 until end of turn. If an opponent controls a Sphinx, Demon, Dragon, or Hydra, draw a card.

card.name: Leyline Reclaimer
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) When Leyline Reclaimer enters the battlefield, each opponent creates a Treasure token. Annihilator 1 (Whenever this creature attacks, defending player sacrifices a permanent.)

card.name: Militia Leader
card.text: Militia Leader has flying as long as it's attacking. Whenever Militia Leader attacks, another target creature you control gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: Inthalli Jumbomancer
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell with mana value 5 or greater, surveil 1. (To surveil 1, look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Break the Surface
card.text: Target opponent sacrifices a creature. If a creature with mana value 2 or less is sacrificed this way, create a 3/3 green Dinosaur creature token.

card.name: Crozen, the Eversquall
card.text: Kicker {1}{B}{B} (You may pay an additional {1}{B}{B} as you cast this spell.) Flying When Crozen, the Eversquall enters the battlefield, if it was kicked, destroy target creature.

card.name: Cryptsworn Dautter
card.text: Exile a creature card from your graveyard: Put a Rune counter on target permanent you control. Creatures you control with Rune counters on them are Skeleton Warriors and have "{1}{B}, Pay 2 life: This creature gains indestructible until end of turn. Tap it."

card.name: Steal Power
card.text: Target creature you don't control loses indestructible and gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Target creature you control gains indestructible and gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Brilliant Manaplume
card.text: Flying, haste At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you've cast an instant or sorcery spell this turn that targeted a creature you don't control, return Brilliant Manaplume from the graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Draguzal, Rig Tyrant
card.text: Flying When you cast Draguzal, Rig Tyrant, each player creates a Fuel token. (Fuel is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.") Whenever Draguzal deals combat damage to a player, destroy target Fuel that player controls. When that Fuel is destroyed this way, it deals 3 damage to each creature that player controls.

card.name: Hold to the Fire
card.text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Then put a blaze counter on that creature. For as long as that creature has a blaze counter on it, it has "At the beginning of your upkeep, this creature deals 1 damage to you."

card.name: Smoldering Engine
card.text: At the beginning of your combat on your turn, put an oil counter on Smoldering Engine. Then if it has five or more oil counters on it, remove all of them and create a 5/5 red Dragon creature token with flying and haste.

card.name: Erekai's Forerunner
card.text: You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Landfall — Whenever a land enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Then if this is the second time this ability has resolved this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Giant's Toe
card.text: Flash When Giant's Toe enters the battlefield, create two Potion tokens. (They're artifacts with "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target creature.") Whenever a Potion you control targets a creature, that creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.

card.name: Picnic Tyrant
card.text: {4}{G}{G}: Monstrosity 2. (If this creature isn't monstrous, put two +1/+1 counters on it and it becomes monstrous.) When Picnic Tyrant becomes monstrous, create a Food token, and Picnic Tyrant fights up to one target creature. (It's an artifact with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: You gain 3 life.")

card.name: Heroic Victory
card.text: When Heroic Victory enters the battlefield, exile target creature you don't control until Heroic Victory leaves the battlefield. When Heroic Victory enters the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Serpentine Simulacrum
card.text: Flash Exploit (When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a creature.) When Serpentine Simulacrum exploits a creature, exile target spell, nonland permanent, or card in a graveyard.

card.name: Terrik, Hog Rider
card.text: Enlist (As this creature attacks, you may tap a nonattacking creature you control without summoning sickness. When you do, add its power to this creature's until end of turn.) When Terrik, Hog Rider enters the battlefield, create a 2/2 green Boar creature token. Whenever Terrik, Hog Rider enlists a Boar creature, Terrik, Hog Rider gains menace until end of turn.

card.name: Scale's Judgment
card.text: Exile target creature with power 4 or less. You gain life equal to its toughness.

card.name: Tomb Crier
card.text: Bestow {W} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Tomb Crier enters the battlefield with a shield counter on it if it is a creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Totem armor (If enchanted permanent would be destroyed, instead remove all damage from it and destroy this Aura.)

card.name: Anti-Gravity Field
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has defender and first strike.

card.name: Xerex Songbird
card.text: Flying Whenever Xerex Songbird deals combat damage to a player, put a phasing counter on target creature. (That creature phases in or out before its controller untaps during each of their untap steps. While it's phased out, it's treated as though it doesn't exist.)

card.name: Dreg Wanderer
card.text: When Dreg Wanderer enters the battlefield, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. Graveyard evoke {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell from your graveyard for its graveyard evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters the battlefield.)

card.name: Sanguineous Trickle
card.text: Buyback—Pay 4 life. (You may pay 4 life in addition to any other costs as you cast this spell. If you do, put this card into your hand as it resolves.) Sanguineous Trickle deals 1 damage to target creature and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Autguk, Man-Made Horror
card.text: Ravenous (This creature enters with X +1/+1 counters on it. If X is 5 or more, draw a card when it enters.) When Autguk, Man-Made Horror enters the battlefield, gain control of each creature with power less than Autguk, Man-Made Horror until end of turn. Untap those creatures. They gain haste until end of turn.

card.name: Firestorm Frenzy
card.text: When Firestorm Frenzy enters the battlefield, each opponent creates a token copy of it. Whenever one or more creatures deal combat damage to you, Firestorm Frenzy deals damage to you equal to the number of creatures attacking you.

card.name: Enlightened Vision
card.text: Enchant creature When Enlightened Vision enters the battlefield, choose a player and a basic land type. Enchanted creature has trample and gets +X/+X, where X is the number of lands with the chosen type that the chosen player controls.

card.name: Rusted Caretaker
card.text: Trample Metalcraft — You may have Rusted Caretaker assign its combat damage as though it weren't blocked as long as you control three or more artifacts.

card.name: Battle Glory
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell or activate an ability that targets a creature you control, untap that creature and put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Icakar, the Eccentric
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) [+X]: Each player mills X cards. X must be the number of cards exiled with Icakar. [-X]: Target creature gets +X/+X until end of turn and each player draws X cards. X must be the number of cards exiled with Icakar.

card.name: Winds of Fire
card.text: Multikicker {UR} (You may pay an additional {UR} any number of times as you cast this spell.) Choose any target, then choose another target for each time this spell was kicked. Each creature chosen this way has base toughness 1 until end of turn.

card.name: Avian Decoy
card.text: Reach When Avian Decoy enters the battlefield, exile the top card of your library. When Avian Decoy dies or is exiled from the battlefield, return the exiled card to your hand.

card.name: Debris Tiller
card.text: When Debris Tiller enters the battlefield, target land becomes a colorless land named Wastes with "{T}: Add {C}" and loses all other card types and abilities. (This effect lasts indefinitely.) {C}, {T}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.

card.name: Quintessence Blade
card.text: Whenever Quintessence Blade becomes attached to a creature, exile target creature. Equipped creatures gets +X/+X, where X is the total power of creature cards exiled with Quintessence Blade. {6}: Attach Quintessence Blade to target creature. Activate only as a sorcery and only once.

card.name: Towering Tower
card.text: Reach, trample, hexproof

card.name: Tundra Prowler
card.text: Provoke (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block it if able.) Whenever Tundra Prowler deals excess combat damage to a creature, you gain that much life.

card.name: Sacred Woods
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}: Scry 1. Spend only mana produced by Sacred Woods to activate this. Activate only as a sorcery.
